summary_one_line: An ICC profile whose substituted magic/colorspace FOURCC fields parse and reach _MultiplyMatrix with an empty Elements pipeline list.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An ICC profile header with byte-exact magic and colorspace signature FOURCCs (offsets ~0x0c-0x16: e.g. profile-class/colorspace fields differing from the loser's 'mntr'/'RGB XYZ' layout) that pass header validation, get optimized, and reach _MultiplyMatrix while *pt1 (Lut->Elements) is NULL, taking the true side at cmsopt.c:196.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving vpc seeds carry distinct FOURCC content at the diverging offsets (e.g. 0x10-0x16 'CMY'/'Lab', 0x0c-0x0f 'prtr'/zeros) produced by CMP-guided substitution; the per-role overlay shows W reaches L196 with T=14 (true branch taken) where L only reaches F=154, so the winner exercises the empty-Elements true-return path.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile seeds are stuck on a single 'mntr'/'RGB XYZ' header layout and never produce the byte-exact field combination that drives the pipeline to an empty Elements list; at L196 the loser shows T=0 F=154, i.e. it always falls through the false side and never resolves the true branch in 10/10 blocked trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace over value_profile: the CmpLogObserver buffers the exact comparand FOURCC/magic values the parser compares against and I2SRandReplace splices them back into the matching input offsets, letting the winner satisfy the header-signature equality CMPs that gate reaching _MultiplyMatrix with the required pipeline state. value_profile only has the CMP_MAP distance gradient and no substitution mutator, so it cannot place the exact bytes.

evidence_trail.claim: The only decisive pair at this branch is value_profile_cmplog beating value_profile on the I2S technique delta.
The blocked side is the true branch of the empty-Elements early return at cmsopt.c:196.
The winner takes the true side at L196 while the loser never does, confirming the winner resolves the empty-Elements path.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 196  T=14 F=22  T=0 F=154  if (*pt1 == NULL) return AnyOpt;  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: Winner and loser inputs differ at the colorspace/profile FOURCC header offsets, with concentrated distinct byte values.
Loser-blocking seeds share a single fixed 'mntr'/'RGB XYZ' header layout.
Winner-resolving seeds carry a distinct 'CMY'/'Lab' colorspace layout produced under value_profile_cmplog.
value_profile_cmplog's mutator set adds I2SRandReplace over value_profile, which lacks it.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, only the CMP_MAP distance feedback.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2216 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed aad94b131ccba396` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 17 of the 18-level ancestor chain; the tool reports 'I2S-floor signal: 1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 17', the characteristic unwrapped I2SRandReplace find for vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating an empty-pipeline path behind a byte-exact FOURCC/magic equality where value_profile resolves the branch as often as value_profile_cmplog (no I2S advantage), which would show the gate is not the divergence driver.

weakest_evidence_point: Whether reaching the L196 true branch (empty Elements) is gated specifically by the FOURCC header CMPs rather than by an unrelated parse path that the I2S substitution happens to unlock indirectly.
